overall.description: A character in wizard robes walks through an ornate indoor courtyard with cherry blossom trees and cobblestone pathways, approaching a large decorated wooden door. The footage is from a video game featuring warm torchlight and gothic stone architecture reminiscent of a historic castle.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone corridor with archway leading to courtyard

events.description: character exits the dark stone corridor into the lit courtyard space

agents.ego_description: walking through an arched stone doorway from a narrow corridor into a larger courtyard area

entered.detail: stone archway framing the entrance with carved details
lit wall-mounted torches providing warm yellow illumination
cone-shaped trimmed bushes in decorative planters
trees with pink cherry blossoms visible in the courtyard ahead
ornate stone lamp posts lining the cobblestone path
large carved wooden door with metal studs at the far end of the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a narrow stone corridor framed by an arched doorway, with wall sconces providing warm light. They walk forward, passing potted topiary, and transition into a larger courtyard space where blossom trees and a distant ornate wooden door become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with blossom trees and central pathway leading to grand door

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone path toward the large wooden door, passing stone lanterns and garden beds

entered.detail: stone seating bench positioned near the destination door
elaborately carved stone arch surrounding the wooden door

segments.scene_description: The character traverses the open courtyard with cobblestone flooring, passing beneath cherry blossom trees and stone lanterns. The ornate wooden door grows larger as they approach, revealing detailed carvings and flanking stone benches, while the entrance corridor falls behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined stone corridor into an expansive, blossom-filled courtyard. It begins within a narrow passage framed by an arched doorway, moving forward past warm wall sconces and potted topiary. As the character advances, the space opens up into a wide courtyard where the lighting shifts to reveal cobblestone flooring and stone lanterns beneath flowering cherry blossom trees. The scene then expands as the camera traverses the open area, leaving the entrance corridor behind while the perspective narrows toward a large, ornate wooden door. Finally, the movement concludes as the detailed carvings of the door and its flanking stone benches grow larger and more prominent in the frame.
